review_title: A Decade with Putler: My Indispensable Data Partner
description: I've been using Putler for over 10 years, starting when it was still a young app. Back then, it didn’t have Etsy integration, so I requested it — and the team built it just for me! Since then, it’s become an essential part of how I run my business. I use it monthly to analyze my sales across all shops, track growth, and understand my customers. It has evolved into a robust analytics platform that gives me confidence in my decisions. Whenever an issue comes up, tech support is quick to help and genuinely listens. Putler feels like a long-term partner in my business success.
author: Ekaterina S.
pros: Putler has been my trusted data companion for a decade. I love how it brings all my shop data — from Etsy, Ravelry, and other platforms — into one clean dashboard. The ability to see my sales, products, and customers in one place saves hours every month. Over the years, the analytics tools have become incredibly powerful, offering clear insights into trends, top-performing products, and customer behavior. The team behind Putler deserves special mention — their customer support is fast, friendly, and genuinely cares about helping users succeed.
cons: The dashboard can sometimes feel overwhelming with so many parameters about sales, products, and customers. There are times when I’m not sure what certain figures mean or how they were calculated. Because the app has become so feature-rich and complex, I occasionally encounter small bugs or data that seem inaccurately represented. However, the support team is always quick to address any issues that arise.

review_title: Best on the market by far
description: I've been using Putler since 2013, and every iteration gets better and better. The online version has a great new dashboard with more segmentation options so you can drill down on your data. I still keep the desktop app open all the time and enjoy the Ka'ching when a sale comes through. I always recommend this to my peers - especially if they use both Paypal and Stripe.
author: Paul B.
pros: Sales analytics from multiple sources especially Paypal and Stripe. For a recurring software business, this is the only tool on the market that does this. Things I like especially are: 1) Responsive 2) Quickly segment by payment processor 3) Data selections are intuitive. 4) Comparisons of previous periods. 5) Ability to view multiple companies /accounts at once or flick /segment between them. 6) Search by customer email 7) Great support
cons: I wish the MRR and Subscription stats refreshed faster, but I know they are working on this part. Waiting for a native mobile version.

review_title: Putler doesn't allow cancellation easily
description: Rich data, but at a cost.
author: Brett N.
pros: Putler is ok - it gives you decent information digging into customer data.
cons: Putler is ok, but when a software company has hoops and hurdles to cancel an account, it's bad news.

review_title: Amazing data to review
author: Allie G.
pros: The amount of data is amazing. They give you so much to look through and utilize or not. Support is so fast. I use etsy and its such an easy add on
cons: Some of the information can be overwhelming and can be off it the data pull is limited or doesn’t translate into the right catergory.

review_title: Best Reporting for Easy Digital Downloads
description: We are on a trial and still evaluating but we found Putler when looking for better PayPal reporting. What sold me on trying it is that it connect with Easy Digital Downloads (EDD) which has some of the worst reporting I have ever seen. The tool is very easy to setup and reports are easy to view. Pricing is fair but I suggest contacting them for custom pricing to find a plan that is better suited for your needs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to setup and the fact it connect to anything you want for eCommerce is really the selling point.
cons: Multiple user support is weird as you have to setup teams and invite people to those teams. It would be better if you could just add users to the entire root account as a admin by default if you wanted like many other solutions.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Finally, All My Business Data in One Place
description: Putler transformed how I manage my multi-stream business by eliminating the need to jump between multiple platforms for insights. Before this, I was constantly switching between PayPal, Stripe, and Google Analytics, often getting conflicting numbers. Now I have a single source of truth that saves me hours weekly on manual data compilation. The customer segmentation and forecasting features have directly contributed to better business decisions and increased revenue.
author: Waqas Q.
pros: Putler consolidates data from 17+ integrations (PayPal, Stripe, WooCommerce, Shopify) into one digestible dashboard. The ability to compare daily, monthly, and yearly revenue against previous periods is incredibly intuitive. Customer lifetime value insights and RFM analysis help identify highest-value customers. Finally have accurate numbers I can trust instead of conflicting data across platforms.
cons: There is no clear way to see different plans and pricing. There is a 15-30 minute delay before the payments are updated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Putler helping to Monitor, analyze, and grow your business with multichannel reports and insights
author: RAKHUL P A.
pros: We can monitoring all our ecommerce data from a single place. Putler provides accurate reports & metrics. We can finding good opportunities based on insights & trends. We can also Set, track & achieve sales goals quite easily
cons: A bit pricy but worth it as it does what it is meant for.

review_title: eCommerce Analytics and Business Intelligence
author: Coën V.
pros: - has integrations to major players in online business providers and services - deep insights and segmentation gives you a clear understanding of your business's performance - active development - follows industry best practices on data insights - goal settings - real time events on sales channels
cons: - should integrate actionable features e.g. create new campaign or coupon with connected sales channel without having to leave putler
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Clear and accurate insights of your entire business.
author: Henry H.
pros: Putler is a simple and easy to use tool that will help you to track your sales. It helps you to improve your business by showing the data of all the products sold, number of customers, revenue, etc. This software is really helpful in improving my business because it allows me to view everything I need at one place with just one click!
cons: It needs a lot more integrations like Facebook Ads, Google Ads, Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, Etsy, Ebay and more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Putler made me amazed!!
author: Abhinash J.
pros: I was looking for a way to keep track of my business analytics and Putler.ai is the way to go! As a digital marketer, I found that I'm constantly juggling multiple channels and want to know how my various marketing initiatives are performing. Putler.ai gives me everything I need in one place. I can access my analytics and reports from a single interface, which makes it so much easier to collect and analyze the data I need. The tool is easy to use and there is a ton of data and insights, and I can even use it with my clients and collaborate on our accounts with the team.
cons: Not much I didn't find and it would be great if putler video onboarding videos
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Useful statistics for small businesses
author: Simon S.
pros: Great interface and useful well-thought out statistics/datamining. Responsive support.
cons: Would be useful to aggregate from more sources. e.g. Xero, API or webhooks

review_title: Terrific sales dashboard
description: It's a game-changing dashboard for viewing, mainly, sales related data. I do occasionally look at traffic stats and/or make refunds through the platform; but primarily I love its commercial insights.
author: Matt B.
pros: Helps me see cross-sections of my data from a range of different end points in a single dashboard.
cons: Nothing. I've found the support team to be highly responsive on the rare occasions I've had an issue.

review_title: Putler Keeps Getting Better
description: Putler is the best product I have found in its class. It's also a good value, which is why I have remained a long-time customer.
author: Patrick C.
pros: Keeping track of sales and trends is key for any online marketer; my business is no exception. That's why I rely on Putler to aggregate and give me a visual, real-time snapshot of sales from all channels.
cons: The default stock iconography for customers. I would prefer something different. It's a very small thing but it is something I would change and maybe there is a way to do that already.

review_title: The only solution for at-a-glance PayPal and Stripe stats
description: I can now leave the app open and check a specific stat (i.e. Lifetime Value of a specific customer, how this quarter compares to last quarter, etc.) within seconds. Good luck trying to do that in PayPal/Stripe's dashboard.
author: Steve M.
pros: Putler is a great app that helps me keep track of my small business. At a super affordable monthly price (especially compared with others), I can find what I need for all PayPal and Stripe payments within seconds. The fact that it combines the two into one total amount is such a time-saver. Besides the easy to use and easy on the eyes reporting, my favourite feature of Putler is the cash register sound that happens when there's a sale lol. It seems trivial, but that additional feature always motivates me when I hear it.
cons: The only thing I would change is that it would update in realtime (without a delay from the API), but I understand that is probably not good for the API to constantly call the payment gateway, and would also be annoying if the register was going off like crazy.

review_title: Beautiful - Exactly how it should be
description: We have spent a significant amount of time looking for software that we can plugin to our merchant provider with clear, concise information that is relevant to our business model. IE. Card revenue income data. There are some big boys out there but they do not come close to what Putler has pulled off. Well thought out. Highly recommended.
author: Martha H.
pros: Layout Ease of use Data available Pricing
cons: No subscription data for Braintree yet but believe that is coming shortly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great and affordable tool to monitor your sales and subscriptions
author: Luca S.
pros: It's easy to use, quite complete and affordable.
cons: The subscription section could be improved with more stats and useful insights.

review_title: Saved my business
description: I use Putler monthly to quickly calculate how much I pay my franchisees. This is of huge value to me.
author: Stephan D.
pros: I was going to close up my business until I got Putler. Putler helped me understand which products were selling more and why. I realized that we were making a lot more money than I thought and it helped me make the decision to invest more in the company. That was six years ago and it's been getting better ever since.
cons: It was hard to log in for years. The way the changed the data visualization with the new version made it slightly worse. Also it's hard to search for transactions. The default icons are slightly goofy. It's not really designed for a subscription like my own, rather it wants to pretend my business sells products.

review_title: Just a Great Product
description: Putler give me a great handle on sales, customers, and products - current, historical and trends
author: Scott S.
pros: It catches sales and provides data from ALL of our platforms
cons: It misses some sales and I cannot figure out why - and I have not gotten a response from Support (3 weeks at this point)

review_title: All my sales data is at the ready - No more manual exports from my Woocommerce shop
description: I love how all my sales information is so quickly accessible and sortable. I can do sales research and analysis quickly and effortlessly, even going back years. Before Putler I was endlessly (and slowly) exporting records from my Woocommerce shop and trying to stitch them together in a spreadsheet and then analysing them with complicated formulas. Now I can select my dates and the information is there and charted for me.
author: Nicolai G.
pros: The automatic RFM analysis of customers that it provides is amazingly useful and identifies the different segments of my customers and lets me customise my marketing to them Putler does an amazing job of seamlessly consolidating all my data across my Woocommerce store, PayPal and Stripe accounts.
cons: I can't export more than 3,000 customer records at a time and that is a huge disappointment
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to implement and use analytics tool
author: Ronen S.
pros: Putler is the easiest and most powerful e-commerce analytics tool I've used. I chose it over competitors because out of the box it was able to process my data correctly (Stripe and PayPal are my payment processors. The app set up in minutes and continues to run flawlessly.
cons: I would love a more straightforward mobile app. Right now I have a shortcut on my phone to the Putler website, which offers all of the analytics. However, an app with a home screen widget would be helpful.

review_title: SO glad I found this!
author: Tara R.
pros: Most competitors only cater to businesses with monthly recurring revenue. I love how well this works whether you have MRR or now. Super easy to use
cons: No mobile app. A little buggy on mobile phone

review_title: Awesome software
description: Great customer care and great product
author: Ankur S.
pros: Its very easy to setup. Currently, i have 2 products with 3 leverls. I can easily see which client is with us for longest duration. I can also see churn rate . Thats where i was shocked to see my churn rate of 50% per month. I asked my manager, fixed the issues and right now my churn rate is 10%. Still, its a lot, but putler helped me to nitce it.
cons: Nothing as of now. Everything works as expected

review_title: Useful software at an affordable price
description: They have been very helpful. Everything has been great
author: Daniel C.
pros: The amount of integrations and marketplaces you use.
cons: Would like to be able to track stock and complete orders within the Putler dashboard.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Putler Rules
description: Overall, I had a great experience using the software and I would recommend it to anybody who is looking for a great dashboard to manage their company
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Putler is great for managing a lot of people, schedules, and finances
cons: I least like that the software was so expensive. If it was more affordable, I think more people would use it.

review_title: Command center for all your revenue
author: William T.
pros: For people who has multiple income sources and payment gateways, it pulls and present all your data into one easy to manage platform. Since I'm new to Putler, it's too early for me to know if it will be a right fit for me and my businesses, but I can see it has potential.
cons: The data import could be faster other than that I haven't found any other cons so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
